description: Capability matrix the v0.1 binding publishes. Per PRD-300-R28 / A15 every flag is set truthfully: ssr-walk + rsc + concurrent are implemented (true); static-ast (Babel/SWC), streaming (onAllReady wiring), suspense, and headless-render are follow-up milestones (false). The PRD-301-R20 published target table flips these to true as each milestone lands.
